source.title: Town of Riverhead Town Board Meeting Minutes

note: Career voting records aggregated from every meeting on record. 'Absent' is inferred when a member appears on no roll-call line of a vote.
partySource: Party affiliation is from local election-results reporting (RiverheadLOCAL, Riverhead News-Review), not the meeting minutes.
